title: Blue Sonnet
titleNative: 紅い牙 ブルーソネット
synopsis: Sonnet is a cyborg/esper from a harsh background and now trained to be the ultimate warrior and most powerful weapon in the world. She is sent to Japan to watch Komatsuzaki Lan, who is thought to be controlled by the rage of the esper Akai Kiba (Crimson Fang). Lan is a quiet girl who knows she's different from everybody else and starts to show signs of Crimson Fang after coming into contact with Sonnet. In the course of fighting with Lan, Sonnet starts to rediscover her humanity. At the same time Lan has to fight to retain her humanity and control the Crimson Fang. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Blue Gender: The Warrior
titleNative: BLUE GENDER THE WARRIOR
synonyms: ブルージェンダー ザ・ウォリアー
synopsis: It is unknown how long they have existed. Some sightings date back to 2017. But in the year 2031 Humankind was replaced as the dominant species on Earth. They are known only as The Blue. Many believed that the Blue were created by a rogue nation as a weapon of mass destruction. But it soon became all too evident that this was not the case. These monstrous insect-like creatures now exert their terrible will upon the planet. As a result, the remains of the human race have fled into outer space to escape the infestation of the Blue. Suddenly awakened after 22 years in suspended animation, Yuji Kaido finds himself thrust into a nightmarish reality. Yuji soon learns that the very survival of the entire human race rests in his hands. (Source: Funimation)

title: Fushigi ‌no ‌Kuni ‌de ‌Alice to: Dive ‌in ‌Wonderland
titleNative: 不思議の国でアリスと -Dive in Wonderland-
synonyms: Alicja w Krainie Czarów: Dive in Wonderland
Alice au pays des merveilles : Dive in Wonderland
synopsis: I'm supposed to be reading the air so I don't screw up, I'm doing what everyone else is doing, Why can't I get things done? Rise Azumino, a university student, was lost in her life, One day, guided by an invitation letter left behind by her late grandmother, she enters “Wonderland". There she meets a girl named Alice and they begin their journey together. Rise meets the White Rabbit, the Caterpillar, the Queen of Hearts, the Trumpeter, the Mad Hatter and the March Hare, Humpty Dumpty, the twins Tweedle Dum and Tweedle Dee, the Cheshire Cat and ...... The residents of Wonderland appear one after another in front of Rise! And the crazy commotion that ensues! What kind of future will Rise choose in this crazy adventure with Alice? This adventure will surely bring a smile to your face tomorrow! (Source: Official Site, Translated)

ความรักนี้เพื่อนสมัยเด็กไม่แพ้รักแรกหรอก
เลิฟคอเมดี้เรื่องนี้ เพื่อนสมัยเด็กไม่มีวันแพ้
synopsis: She smiles just for me. Her name is Kachi Shirokusa and she's even an award-winning high school girl writer! And she's beautiful! I know that she's totally out of reach for me, a normal high school kid named Maru Sueharu! But I think something's there... No, there's definitely something there! Or so I thought... but Kachi has a boyfriend?! Seeing me depressed, my friend ever since we were little who's cute, cheerful, and loves to look after others, Shida Kuroha... who also apparently had no problem telling me that she likes me for some reason just suggested, "Let's get revenge." (Source: Crunchyroll)

One day, an angel named "Devilun" appears before her, and grants her the power to be the beautiful magical girl dinosaur angel warrior "Prima Angel," and tells her to fight the evil "Darkness Whales" organization. She proceeds to indiscriminately take out Darkness Whales members with weapons that stink of blood. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Demon City Shinjuku
titleNative: 魔界都市〈新宿〉
synopsis: Ten Years ago, Genichirou Izayoi died trying to stop the sorcerer Rebi Ra, and as a result Shinjuku became a playground for demons. And now, the day approaches when Rebi Ra will complete his decade-long ritual to plunge the rest of the world into chaos! As Genichirou's son, it falls to Kyouya to venture into the heart of Shinjuku and put an end to the sorcerer his father couldn't beat. Can Kyouya exceed his father's legacy, or will the demons of Shinjuku create Hell on Earth? (Source: Discotek)

title: The Wonderful Adventures of Nils Movie
titleRomaji: Nils no Fushigi na Tabi: Movie
titleEnglish: The Wonderful Adventures of Nils Movie
titleNative: ニルスのふしぎな旅 劇場版
synonyms: The Wonderful Adventures of Nils: The Film
synopsis: Nils Holgersson is a young boy on a farm who is cruel to the animals. But when he catches the farm's little goblin it becomes one prank too many. He is magically shrunk and suddenly the farm animals are out for revenge. He flees on the back of the goose Morten and they join up with a flock of wild geese. Together they travel all over Sweden, with Nils hoping to find a way to become big again. Note: The film was produced in 1982, but it didn't receive a theatrical release. It became available to the public in 1995 when it got a home release. It wasn't until January 2015 when it would see its first screening in theaters, more than three decades after its production.

title: Welcome to Pia Carrot! 2 DX
titleNative: Pia キャロット へ ようこそ!! 2 DX
synopsis: Kouji wants to work part-time, so when he saw a cute girl wearing a Pia Carrot uniform, he tried to get a job there. On the way there, he accidentally bumped into Azusa, and with some misunderstanding, they literally hate each other. To Kouji's surprise, he finds that she also got a job in the Pia Carrot, forcing him to face her daily. But with time, he will discover that 'hate' is not the appropriate word to describe his feelings... (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Ichigeki Sacchuu!! Hoihoi-san
titleNative: 一撃殺虫!!ホイホイさん
synonyms: One-Shot Bug Killer!! Interceptor Doll HoiHoi-san
synopsis: The time is the near future. Cockroaches and other household pests have become immune to all forms of insecticides. In response to this crisis, a Japanese company has created small, doll-like, insect exterminating robots called Hoi Hoi-san. A competing company has also released their own version, Combat-san. Because of their adorable appearance, these little robots have become somewhat of a phenomenon and have gained many fans. Late at night, in the home of one such fan, Hoi Hoi-san and Combat-san search for insects to exterminate... but Combat-san is not above trying to exterminate Hoi Hoi-san while she's at it.

title: Uproar in Heaven
titleNative: 大闹天宫
synonyms: The Monkey King: Uproar in Heaven
synopsis: Uproar in Heaven, also known as Havoc in Heaven, is a Chinese animated feature film directed by Wan Laiming and produced by all four of the Wan brothers. The film was created at the height of the Chinese animation industry in the 1960s, and received numerous awards. It earned the brothers domestic and international recognition. The story is based on the earliest chapters of the classic story Journey to the West. The main character is Sun Wukong, aka the Monkey King, who rebels against the Jade Emperor of heaven. It became one of the most influential films in all of Asia, animation or not. Countless cartoon adaptations that followed have reused the same classic story Journey to the West, yet many consider this 1964 iteration to be the most original, fitting and memorable.
